title: State can't act on whims and fancies: Patna High Court sets aside downgrade of MP Pappu Yadav’s security
description: The Patna High Court recently set aside the Bihar government’s decision to downgrade the security cover of Lok Sabha Member of Parliament (MP) Rajesh Ranjan, popularly known as Pappu Yadav [Rajesh Ranjan @ Pappu Yadav v Union of India & Ors.].In the order dated May 14, Justice Jitendra Kumar held that the Bihar government's move was arbitrary and taken without following due process.
